ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the price data */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous closing price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the day */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last traded price */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price for the day */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price during the trading session */,
  "ttl_trd_qty" INTEGER /* Total trading quantity */,
  "turnover_lacs" REAL /* Turnover in lacs */,
  "no_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed */,
  "deliv_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity delivered */,
  "deliv_per" REAL /* Percentage of delivery */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the trading session */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous close */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the price information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding stock price record */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade execution */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy/sell) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker facilitating the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the trade information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the brokerage firm */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brokerage */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the broker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the brokerage firm */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the brokerage */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the broker was registered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the broker information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the user information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price drop) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related trade */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding compliance */,
  "compliance_officer" TEXT /* Name of the compliance officer who reviewed the trade */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance review was conducted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the compliance record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)
